message:
Fix curl flags consistency in clawdbot README

The "Updating" section used `-sL` while the "Quick Install" section
used `-fsSL` for the same type of download operation. Updated to use
`-fsSL` consistently, which:

- `-f`: Fail silently on HTTP errors (non-zero exit code)
- `-s`: Silent mode (no progress meter)
- `-S`: Show errors even in silent mode
- `-L`: Follow redirects

This ensures consistent behavior across all download commands in the
documentation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -151,7 +151,7 @@ To update to the latest version:
 cp ~/clawd/SECURITY.md ~/clawd/SECURITY.md.backup
 
 # Download latest
-curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/acip/main/integrations/clawdbot/SECURITY.md \
+curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/acip/main/integrations/clawdbot/SECURITY.md \
   -o ~/clawd/SECURITY.md
 
 # Verify checksum (recommended)
